blocks.body: Modalne w przeszłości pomagają wyciągać wnioski o przeszłości i mówić o żalu, krytyce albo możliwym minionym rezultacie.

{"level":"B1-B2","intro":"W tym temacie zobaczysz, jak formy must have, might have, could have, can't have i should have pomagają mówić o wnioskach o przeszłości, żalu, krytyce i możliwym minionym rezultacie.","rules":[{"label":"PAST DEDUCTION","color":"emerald","text":"Must have = jestem prawie pewny, że to wydarzyło się w przeszłości.","example":"She must have forgotten."},{"label":"PAST POSSIBILITY","color":"blue","text":"Might have / could have = to było możliwe, ale niepewne.","example":"He might have taken the wrong train."},{"label":"REGRET / CRITICISM","color":"amber","text":"Should have / shouldn't have = trzeba było / nie trzeba było.","example":"You should have called me."}]}

{"title":"1. Główny wzór","intro":"Przy modalach odnoszących się do przeszłości bardzo często potrzebujesz konstrukcji modal + have + V3.","items":[{"label":"Strong deduction","title":"must have + V3","subtitle":"must have left / must have forgotten"},{"label":"Possible past","title":"might have / could have + V3","subtitle":"might have missed / could have taken"},{"label":"Impossible past","title":"can't have + V3","subtitle":"can't have gone / can't have seen"},{"label":"Regret / criticism","title":"should have / shouldn't have + V3","subtitle":"should have called / shouldn't have said"}]}

{"title":"2. Główne zastosowania","sections":[{"label":"Must have = mocny wniosek o przeszłości","color":"emerald","description":"Używaj must have, gdy obecne oznaki bardzo mocno sugerują, że coś wydarzyło się wcześniej.","examples":[{"en":"She isn't here. She must have gone home.","ua":"Jej tu nie ma. Musiała pójść do domu."},{"en":"They look exhausted. They must have worked all night.","ua":"Wyglądają na wykończonych. Musieli pracować całą noc."},{"en":"The cake is gone. Someone must have eaten it.","ua":"Ciasta nie ma. Ktoś musiał je zjeść."}]},{"label":"Might have / could have = możliwe minione zdarzenie","color":"blue","description":"Te formy pokazują, że coś było możliwe albo mogło się wydarzyć, ale nie masz pewności.","examples":[{"en":"He might have missed the email.","ua":"Mógł przeoczyć maila."},{"en":"She could have taken a taxi.","ua":"Mogła wziąć taksówkę."},{"en":"We might have met before.","ua":"Być może spotkaliśmy się już wcześniej."}],"note":"Could have może też mówić o niewykorzystanej możliwości: You could have told me. O znaczeniu decyduje kontekst."},{"label":"Should have = żal albo krytyka","color":"amber","description":"Should have i shouldn't have pomagają powiedzieć, że w przeszłości istniał lepszy albo gorszy wybór.","examples":[{"en":"I should have studied more for the exam.","ua":"Powinienem był więcej się uczyć do egzaminu."},{"en":"You shouldn't have said that.","ua":"Nie powinieneś był tego mówić."},{"en":"They should have booked the tickets earlier.","ua":"Powinni byli wcześniej zarezerwować bilety."}],"note":"To bardzo częsty wzór dla żalu i krytyki."}]}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Używanie had zamiast have po modalu.","wrong":"She must had left early.","right":"✅ She must have left early.","hint":"Wzór jest stały: modal + have + V3."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Branie drugiej formy zamiast V3.","wrong":"He can't have went home.","right":"✅ He can't have gone home.","hint":"Po have potrzebujesz past participle, a nie Past Simple."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Pisanie should of zamiast should have.","wrong":"I should of told you.","right":"✅ I should have told you.","hint":"W szybkiej mowie brzmi podobnie, ale poprawna forma to have."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótka reguła","items":["Must have + V3 = mocny wniosek o przeszłości.","Might have / could have + V3 = możliwe minione zdarzenie albo rezultat.","Can't have + V3 = sytuacja w przeszłości jest logicznie niemożliwa.","Should have / shouldn't have + V3 = trzeba było / nie trzeba było.","Zapamiętaj wzór: modal + have + V3."]}

{"title":"Strony w tym dziale","items":[{"label":"Can / Could","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/can-could","current":false},{"label":"May / Might","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/may-might","current":false},{"label":"Must / Have to","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/must-have-to","current":false},{"label":"Should / Ought to","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/should-ought-to","current":false},{"label":"Need / Needn't / Don't have to","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/need-neednt-dont-have-to","current":false},{"label":"Dedukcja z czasownikami modalnymi","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/modals-of-deduction","current":false},{"label":"Modalne w przeszłości","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/past-modals","current":true},{"label":"Prośby / oferty / sugestie","url":"/pl/theory/modal-verbs/requests-offers-suggestions","current":false}]}
